Vicar Street
13-Sep-00

1. Duncan And Brady  
2. To Ramona  
3. Desolation Row  
4. Tomorrow Is A Long Time  
5. Tangled Up In Blue  
6. Ring Them Bells  
7. Country Pie  
8. Can't Wait  
9. Maggie's Farm  
10. Just Like A Woman  
11. Drifter's Escape
